name: Sesame Season Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the sesame seeds in a skillet until they are light brown.
2. Stir in the salt, cook for an additional 5 minutes, then let cool.
3. Add all of the ingredients to a blender and blend for one minute.
4. Store the mixture in a tight container at a cool temperature. This seasoning is great for cottage cheese, salads, baked potatoes, etc.
